title: Mace of Zillyhoo (Homestuck)
description: Mace of Zillyhoo is a Minecraft resource pack that replaces the mace added in MC 1.21 with the WARHAMMER OF ZILLYHOO from Homestuck
body:
Ever wanted to swap out your MACEKIND specibus with a much more recognizeable HAMMERKIND?
NOW YOU CAN!

_"It is so beautiful. You are so bewitched by its beauty, you are not sure if you can wield it."_
